style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like powdered diamonds, while translucent petal-shaped aura particles swirl softly around Butterfree's body in a delicate spiral. A soft, pearlescent glow emanates from its wings, refracting light into pastel hues of lavender and mint, casting a warm yet dreamy ambiance. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
